positive: A symmetrical, cosmic geometric mandala design featuring nebulae clouds, stylized constellations, and glowing celestial flora. The composition should be contained within a central, circular pattern, printed in high contrast deep indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, radiant gold foil, and luminous turquoise accents. Use clean, sharp lines and bioluminescent glow effects to create strong visual impact against a midnight black background. The style must be highly detailed, ethereal, and graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Macro details on star clusters, glowing orbital paths, and abstract cosmic dust fields. Intricate, clean silhouettes.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, trademark, copyright, cropped, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, poor composition, gradient fade, photo-realistic, writing, speech bubble
